title: Magical Foods Pack
description:
Adds 2 magical food items to the game, one that makes you grow, and one that makes you shrink

with more to come
body:
# 🎂 Magical Food Items pack! 🍷
Adds Magical foods that you can craft!
each food does something different to you

At the moment there are 3 foods, you can check the gallery for screenshots and crafting recipes
 The datapack adds 3 items, a **suspicious cake**🎂 that makes you taller, and a **weird drink🍷** that makes you smaller, and a **weird potion** to throw at mobs!
 ### 🌿Custom effects don't go away with time like potions, they reset when you **die**, or when you drink **milk**!🌿
 
 ## This is a mod that has a Datapack inside of it, so it is easier to install, But the items won't show up in the creative menu!
 ![giant player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gKensbmd/images/824d5e1ebd7f41cff3dd6a258ad9302f2ef0c936.png)



# 🧂Installation:🥩
### Mod version:
 Just put the .jar in the mod folder
 
### Datapack version:
 This is both a Datapack and a ResourcePack, put the zip in both directories, ignore warnings

Follow for the updates!
